title: While You Were Sleeping
description: While You Were Sleeping makes sleep meaningful by simulating time passage during the night. Instead of skipping time with no progress, your farms, furnaces, and animals continue working while you rest.
body:
While You Were Sleeping makes sleep meaningful by simulating time passage during the night. Instead of skipping time with no progress, your farms, furnaces, and animals continue working while you rest.

 Features:
 
 • 	Simulates crop growth during sleep
 
 • 	Furnaces smelt items using normal fuel rules
 
 • 	Animal breeding cooldowns are reduced
 
 • 	Works automatically when the player sleeps


Compatibility:
• 	Minecraft 1.21.8
• 	Fabric API
• 	Supports all vanilla crops, furnaces, and animals
Perfect for survival players and automation-focused gameplay.

**Currently working on adding an option in settings to adjust your own tick rate to get full control over the mod**


V1.2.1 SEPT2025
